promotionNotes: v3.0.0: Rewritten for Replicate cloud TTS (Edge TTS removed in v7.4.0)

connections.when: Cloud TTS via Replicate for video narration, audiobooks, or content creation
connections.yields: Replicate TTS model catalog (speech-turbo, speech-hd, chatterbox-turbo, qwen-tts), voice cloning patterns

connections.when: Selecting appropriate voice for non-English text
connections.yields: Language detection for multi-language TTS model selection

connections.when: Reading prose for rhythm checks or generating audiobook narration
Generating narration audio for presentation delivery

metadata.author: Alex
metadata.implementation: Replicate cloud TTS models (MiniMax Speech, Chatterbox, Qwen TTS)
